root.name: change_section_heading_myopia_to_nearsightedness
root.description: Evaluates if the section heading on slide 18 was correctly changed from 'Myopia' to 'Nearsightedness (Myopia)' without introducing errors or extraneous changes.

children.name: heading_text_correctly_changed
children.description: Checks if the heading 'Myopia' on slide 18 was changed to 'Nearsightedness (Myopia)'.

children.name: no_extraneous_slide_modifications
children.description: Ensures that no other content on slide 18 was unnecessarily changed (other than the heading).

children.name: no_other_slides_changed
children.description: Checks that slides other than slide 18 were not modified, added, or removed.

metadata.task: Change the section heading from 'Myopia' to 'Nearsightedness (Myopia)' on slide 18
